== Notes for [[Item:Q109917|Q109917]] ==

From ''Banu Taym'' Tribe (Part of ''Banu Quraysh'' Tribe).

Ancestor of '''Abu Bakr bin Abi Quhaafa'''.

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Banu_Taym

----

From ''Banu Tamim'' Tribe.

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamimi

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Banu_Tamim

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tamim

Source 4: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ad-Darimi

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
